task.dependencies:
DCs:
e1: clean(record_key: $record_key1, survey_key: $survey_key1, survey_name: $survey_name1, sample_key: $sample_key1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1, date_type: $date_type1, location_name: $location_name1, data_type: $data_type1, latitude: $latitude1, longitude: $longitude1, projection: $projection1, aphia_id: $aphia_id1, species: $species1, uncertain: $uncertain1, abundance_sacforn: $abundance_sacforn1, is_dead: $is_dead1, sample_comment: $sample_comment1), clean(record_key: $record_key2, survey_key: $survey_key2, survey_name: $survey_name2, sample_key: $sample_key2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2, date_type: $date_type2, location_name: $location_name2, data_type: $data_type2, latitude: $latitude2, longitude: $longitude2, projection: $projection2, aphia_id: $aphia_id2, species: $species2, uncertain: $uncertain2, abundance_sacforn: $abundance_sacforn2, is_dead: $is_dead2, sample_comment: $sample_comment2), $record_key1 == $record_key2, $aphia_id1 != $aphia_id2 -> #fail.
e2: clean(record_key: $record_key1, survey_key: $survey_key1, survey_name: $survey_name1, sample_key: $sample_key1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1, date_type: $date_type1, location_name: $location_name1, data_type: $data_type1, latitude: $latitude1, longitude: $longitude1, projection: $projection1, aphia_id: $aphia_id1, species: $species1, uncertain: $uncertain1, abundance_sacforn: $abundance_sacforn1, is_dead: $is_dead1, sample_comment: $sample_comment1), clean(record_key: $record_key2, survey_key: $survey_key2, survey_name: $survey_name2, sample_key: $sample_key2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2, date_type: $date_type2, location_name: $location_name2, data_type: $data_type2, latitude: $latitude2, longitude: $longitude2, projection: $projection2, aphia_id: $aphia_id2, species: $species2, uncertain: $uncertain2, abundance_sacforn: $abundance_sacforn2, is_dead: $is_dead2, sample_comment: $sample_comment2), $record_key1 == $record_key2, $species1 != $species2 -> #fail.
